# Beneath the Aurora's Glow
## Scripture
"For the Lord is the great God, the great King above all gods. In his hand are the depths of the earth, and the mountain peaks belong to him. The sea is his, for he made it, and his hands formed the dry land." - Psalm 95:3-5

## Reflection
As we gaze upon the breathtaking display of the Northern Lights, we are reminded of the awe-inspiring glory of God. The dancing colors and swirling patterns of the aurora borealis evoke a sense of wonder and reverence, pointing us to the majesty of our Creator. Just as the Northern Lights illuminate the night sky, God's presence illuminates our lives, guiding us through the darkest moments and revealing His splendor.

## Prayer
Dear Heavenly Father, as we marvel at the beauty of the Northern Lights, we are reminded of Your incredible power and majesty. Help us to behold Your glory in all aspects of creation, from the smallest details to the vast expanses of the universe. May our hearts be filled with wonder, our spirits be lifted with joy, and our lives be illuminated by Your presence. As we bask in the radiance of Your glory, may we reflect Your light to a world in need of Your love and redemption. Amen.
